meta.title: Bible avatar prompts (2+ mentions, individual-only from 200 stories)
meta.note: Generated from assets/200_stories with disciples/apostles/brothers expanded to individuals, then filtered to mention_count >= 2.

common_style: cute chibi character, big head small body (2.5 heads tall), low-poly faceted polygon style, origami papercraft look, clean vector-like shading, pastel colors, soft gradients, thick simple outline, minimal details, friendly expression, front 3/4 view, full body, centered, plain white background, high resolution, consistent proportions, no text, no watermark, same character design system as a consistent set, same face proportions, same polygon count, same shading style, same outline thickness
negative_prompt: realistic, photoreal, anime, manga, 3D render, clay, pixel art, gritty, dark, horror, complex background, text, logo, watermark

palettes.primeval: soft beige + olive + sky blue accents
palettes.patriarch: warm sand + cream + muted teal accents
palettes.judges: olive green + clay brown + muted gold accents
palettes.monarchy: royal purple + navy + gold accents (still pastel)
palettes.prophets_exile: muted indigo + gray + parchment cream accents
palettes.post_exile_return: stone gray + sage green + parchment cream accents
palettes.gospels: cream + sky blue + soft rose accents
palettes.early_church: teal + sea blue + warm brown accents

characters.prompt: COMMON_STYLE, palette: cream + sky blue + soft rose accents, Jesus, adult biblical character (age 25+), cute friendly expression, simple iconic ancient outfit, clean silhouette, cohesive chibi low-poly style
